title: Rustins BRIT250 250ml Brick and Tile Paint - Red
description: Product Description A matt red paint specially formulated on high quality alkyd resins and micronized pigments. Bonds exceptionally well to brick and tile, producing a durable and weather resistant finish. Suitable for interior and exterior use. Box Contains 1 x 250ml brick & tile paint
